backend-only PRs).

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing public API or behavior)
- [ ] Docs / chore / refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] CI / build tooling

## How I tested it

<!--
- Steps you ran locally
- Devices / OSes you exercised it on
- New tests you added
-->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, before/after screenshots or a short screen recording. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is based on the latest `main`
- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes (if I touched `app/`)
- [ ] `flutter test` passes (if I touched `app/`)
- [ ] `dotnet build` passes in Release (if I touched `backend/`)
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense
- [ ] I updated docs (`README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, inline comments) where relevant
- [ ] I did **not** commit any secrets, API keys, or `.env` files
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
